stories.title: Jalen Green's Play-In Record Night Sends Suns Past Warriors 111-96 — Thunder Await in R1

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Jalen Green: 36 PTS, 14/20 FG, 8 three-pointers — TYING the all-time play-in tournament record.

Suns over Warriors 111-96. Phoenix earned the No. 8 West seed.

Green vs. SGA's defending champion Thunder. Sunday, 3:30 PM ET. 🔥

#Suns #NBAPlayoffs

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Steph Curry: 4-for-16 from the field. 17 points. 4 turnovers.

The Warriors scored 30 points off 20 turnovers as Phoenix blew them out 111-96.

The dynasty ends here.

#Warriors #NBA

article.headline: Jalen Green's 36-Point Record Night Sends Suns Past Warriors 111-96

stories.title: Magic Rout Hornets 121-90 — Banchero Leads Dominant Playoff Push, Face No. 1 Pistons

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Paolo Banchero: 25 PTS / 5 REB / 6 AST / 2 STL.
Franz Wagner: 18 PTS / 7 REB / 6 AST.

Magic dominated Hornets 121-90, led by 35 at halftime.

Orlando earns No. 8 East seed and faces No. 1 Detroit Sunday. 🪄

#MagicBasketball #NBAPlayoffs

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
The Charlotte Hornets have now missed the playoffs for 10 consecutive seasons.

Longest active drought in the NBA.

LaMelo scored 23 tonight. It wasn't enough. A franchise-defining question looms.

#Hornets #NBA

article.headline: Magic Rout Hornets 121-90: Banchero Leads Playoff Clinch as Charlotte's Decade of Darkness Continues

stories.title: Lakers Enter Playoffs Without Luka and Reaves Tonight — LeBron Must Carry LA vs Rockets

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
TONIGHT: Rockets @ Lakers, 8:30 PM ET (ABC).

No Luka Doncic. No Austin Reaves. Both out for Round 1.

LeBron James at 41 years old goes it alone vs. Houston.

Lakers are +550 underdogs. This is appointment television.

#LakeShow #NBAPlayoffs

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
Luka Doncic + Austin Reaves averaged 56.8 combined PPG this season.

Both are out tonight.

LeBron James — 41 years old — has to pick up every point vs. the Rockets.

Game 1. 8:30 PM ET. ABC. Don't miss it.

#Lakers #NBAPlayoffs

article.headline: Lakers Without Luka Doncic and Austin Reaves: Can LeBron Carry LA Past the Rockets in Game 1?

stories.title: Full 2026 NBA Playoffs Bracket Preview — Eight First-Round Series and the Road to the Championship

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
The 2026 NBA Playoffs bracket is SET.

Thunder (-3000, defending champs). Pistons (60-22, best record East). Knicks (+600 to rep East).

And somehow, Jalen Green just tied the all-time play-in record against Golden State.

Anything can happen. 🏆

#NBAPlayoffs
